title: Trump meets defense CEOs as Iran operations strain U.S. missile stockpiles
summary_full: The White House is pressing major defense firms to expand missile and munitions output as Iran talks and weapons stockpile concerns put new pressure on the Pentagon’s industrial base.
summary_public: The White House is pressing major defense firms to expand missile and munitions output as Iran talks and weapons stockpile concerns put new pressure on the Pentagon’s industrial base.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Trump meets defense CEOs as Iran operations strain U.S. missile stockpiles
